sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21672" key="gastromanteu/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γαστρο-μαντεύομαι</orth>, <sense id="n21672.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">divine by the belly</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:2:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.4</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
